description_long: This obelisk features a tall, textured blue crystalline spire rising from a sturdy, gray stone base. The base is conical and slightly flared, with a smooth surface and subtle paneling details. Around the lower portion of the blue spire, there are two intersecting, gold-bronze metallic bands that wrap diagonally, forming a decorative X-shape. The blue spire itself is faceted and appears semi-translucent, giving it a striking, luminous quality. The overall design is both modern and monumental, with a blend of natural stone and metallic elements that suggest a ceremonial or commemorative purpose. No visible inscriptions or text are present, and the object is free of additional ornamentation beyond the metallic bands.
description: A tall obelisk with a blue crystalline spire, gold-bronze intersecting bands, and a gray stone conical base. The design is modern and ceremonial, with a luminous, faceted tip.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue spire, gold-bronze X-shaped bands, and the conical gray base with a central panel detail.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical alignment of the blue spire and the metallic bands, with less visible paneling on the base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the blue spire, gold-bronze bands, and the base's panel detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the blue spire and metallic bands prominent, and minimal base detail visible.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative gold-bronze metallic bands intersecting in an X-shape around the lower blue spire; no other ornamentation visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is conical, made of gray stone, with a smooth surface and subtle vertical paneling. It flares outward slightly at the bottom and appears solid and stable.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a tall, faceted blue crystal with a semi-translucent, luminous appearance. It is pointed and unadorned, with the gold-bronze bands wrapping around its lower section.
